feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)

entry.title: Mall
entry.summary:
Author: Sivan325

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 319Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: “How’s everything holding?” Derek asked, hoping that his pack could hear his voice from all over the noises while he was in the mall. “We’re in one piece, nephew,” Peter replied, and then he asked, “How’s the honeymoon?” Written for Full Moon Ficlet #699: Mall

entry.title: My Name is Derek Hale [comic]
entry.summary:
Author: Melioristicbeast

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 0Chapters: 28/?Kudos: 1,580

Summary: From the original fic this comic is an adaptation of:“What day is it?” Derek demanded. “What?” “The day! What day is today?!” Derek let Stiles go, but only so he could reach into his pocket and pull out his phone. He tapped at the home screen, and then went so perfectly still that Stiles was pretty sure this guy wasn’t human. No human could stand that still. When it was clear Derek wasn’t going to move again without some prompting, Stiles said, “It’s Wednesday.” “That’s impossible,” Derek whispered. “Not really, it comes around every seven days.” “This is impossible,” Derek said again, looking around himself, as if he was searching for something.

entry.title: I'D DIE FOR YOU
entry.summary:
Author: knox_rivers

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,086Chapters: 5/9Kudos: 12

Summary: After Dereks death shatters what remains of the pack, Peter is left with an unexpected responsibility. Eli barely understands how to deal with his grief before Peter is tugging him across the country in his redemption arc. "Promise me you’ll take him to Stiles.""You know you’re being dramatic. You aren't going to die.” Peter rolled his eyes at Derek. And what happens next? Derek dies.

entry.title: Rewrite Your History
entry.summary:
Author: StormyBlack

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,681Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 179

Summary: It was definitely not possible for Scott to have just said those words. "What?" Stiles asked again, because what else was he supposed to do? It wasn't possible. It just wasn't. "I said I don't think I can handle your fragile self anymore," Scott repeated. "You complain about everything. Everything hurts you. I don't know what to do anymore. Everything in this world will continue to hurt you. You can't protect yourself, so I'm always down a hand, because someone constantly has to be on 'Stiles duty.' You need to be babysat, and I can't afford to lose someone every time there's a threat in this city, because it happens a lot. And you keep putting yourself at risk. I don't know how to deal with this anymore. It's getting tiring."

entry.title: Anchor
entry.summary:
Author: AngelFeathers (FeathersOfAngels)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,299Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 39

Summary: Every werewolf has an anchor to their humanity, they just have to find it. Derek begrudgingly teaches Stiles about being a werewolf after Stiles is bitten and left inside the ruins of the Hale house. Alternate Universe, things will definitely change.

entry.title: Remember me
entry.summary:
Author: StormyBlack

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 47,130Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 126

Summary: The other teen raised an inquisitive eyebrow at him when Scott called his name, looking entirely surprised that Scott even knew it. Both of the teenagers looked past Scott's shoulder, where the pack was standing united, trying their best not to overwhelm Stiles but anxiously waiting for him to acknowledge them. Maybe with a hug? It had been a long time. "Do you know these people?" the girl inclined her head and whispered into his ear.Her question earned a casual shrug from Stiles, who whispered back a flat, "No."

entry.title: Just Keep Watchin'
entry.summary:
Author: sifshadowheart

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,669Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 110

Summary: After a leaked picture of who might have been Ilya Rozanov at a party in Moscow involving not-exactly-league-approved behavior, the Boston Bears' up-and-coming star was given an ultimatum: billet one of the new rookies through the upcoming season, or face the potential of being cut loose at the end of his ELC if he couldn't clean up his image. Rozanov assumed babysitting a rookie would be a buzzkill at a time going into his third season in Boston that should've been nothing but great hockey and convincing Hollander to finally let him at that ass. Then he found out the rookie he'd been paired with was Stiles Stilinski, and all his assumptions went flying out the window.

entry.title: Every Flavor of You
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 70,895Chapters: 33/45Kudos: 68

Summary: Derek Hale is a high school student who does his best to keep to himself. Until, he ends up as Stiles Stilinski's lab partner. Derek is an unmovable object, but Stiles is an unstoppable force, and their meeting has consequences across the multiverse. This story is a love letter to Sterek Fan Fiction. It imagines that every world from every Sterek fic is real and asks what would it be like if Stiles and Derek could travel to at least some of those worlds. This is a multiverse story. There is (temporary) major character death, and universes where minor characters have long been dead. There are a lot of stopovers into non-graphic portrayals of lots of different classic AUs. This includes a brief stop in an A/B/O AU where there is brief mpreg. There are lots of other AUs they will stop in, but I wanted to list those two things in particular in case they squick anyone out so badly that even non-graphic representations of them are too much. This story was originally my 2025 NaNoWriMo project, posted on my Tumblr. It is now complete and fully edited for AO3. The essence of the story hasn't changed, but I had to do a lot of pacing and characterization edits that weren't possible at the speed of NaNo.

entry.title: The Boy Who Smelled Like Home
entry.summary:
Author: PromptedScribe

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,086Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 74

Summary: Something is happening in the Preserve. The ley lines are humming. Someone has been drawing ritual circles in clearings that haven't seen magic in a generation. And there's a boy—a teenager, living rough in the woods—who smells like woodsmoke and ozone and something impossible. Derek wants him gone. Derek wants him caught, interrogated, expelled, because the last time someone showed up in Beacon Hills smelling like something they shouldn't, people died. But the boy won't talk. The boy runs. The boy looks at Derek with amber-gold eyes and a sharp jaw and an expression of such carefully controlled grief that it makes Derek's wolf howl. And Stiles—Stiles, who was supposed to be leaving, who had one foot out the door and a Georgetown acceptance letter on his laptop—Stiles can't stop looking at the boy either, because something about him feels like recognition. Like déjà vu. Like coming home to a house you've never lived in.

entry.title: moondust
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,143Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 26

Summary: "Derek, fuck, wake up, shit," he swears, voice tight, as tight as Emma's chest feels. She doesn't dare move. The image is surreal as she watches Stiles tear open Derek's jacket, lift up his shirt, pat all over to look for wounds, presumably, and now is really not the time to notice his insane abs. She's relieved to not see any blood, but she's never been around a dead person before, or even a dying one, but is it selfish to be glad that it isn't herself dying instead? "Baby, come on, please," Stiles begs to Derek, pressing on his chest now. Emma recognizes the start of CPR, and shrinks back further against the side of the cottage. Stiles' voice is heartbreaking, and it feels like she's intruding on something extremely personal as she watches tears roll down his cheeks. She can't stop the tears filling her own eyes, and she doesn't know if she's crying for him or for herself anymore. Her heartbeat thrums in her ears and she sinks to her knees, unable to support her own weight anymore, as she watches Stiles' desperate attempts to revive the man. Their mouths meet and tears land on Derek's face and Emma is petrified._Or, a rescue mission for a kidnapped girl goes wrong.

entry.title: The Voyeur
entry.summary:
Author: Sodomitical_Tales

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 82,603Chapters: 29/39Kudos: 63

Summary: Stiles never meant to use his binoculars for anything but the force of good, but that’s probably how a lot of villains start out. The road to Hell and all that. But honestly, if the Universe didn’t want him to spy on his neighbours, it would have told Hottie McScowlface across the yard to buy a set of curtains when he first moved in.Or to work out with clothes on.Or to take his weekly conquests to another apartment for sexy times - one with curtains or without any windows at all. Thank God, it didn't.

entry.title: Stiles Stilinski: Emotional Support Human & Werewolf Chew Toy
entry.summary:
Author: Jinxy143

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 145,740Chapters: 23/?Kudos: 342

Summary: Stiles has options. You’re just along for the ride — so hop into Roscoe and see where this goes.Bring your Stiles body pillow. You might need it. Scott gets bitten.Everything changes. Suddenly, the world is louder, sharper, and a whole lot more dangerous — and the only thing keeping Scott from losing control is his loud-mouthed, chaos-magnet best friend, Stiles. Which would be fine.Except it’s not just Scott. Derek’s watching.Peter’s interested.And for some reason, everyone is getting a little too intense about Stiles Stilinski. Now Stiles is stuck in the middle of werewolves, bad decisions, and a rapidly escalating situation he definitely did not sign up for — while trying very hard not to think about what it means to be the thing grounding them all. Because this?This is not normal. And it’s only going to get worse.

entry.title: Rust, Dust, and Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Dino_Laurus_Rex

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,348Chapters: 23/75Kudos: 66

Summary: Seven years of unspoken words, hidden truths, and a bond forged in the shadows of Beacon Hills. ​Now, hidden away in a secluded bunker, Stiles Stilinski is completely on his own, carrying a secret pregnancy that connects him forever to the Hale lineage. As he looks back on the chaotic history that brought him here, he prepares for the hardest choice of his life—and the ultimate sacrifice made out of love. _______ Or just my version of the sterek ship.

entry.title: A Case Study in Vulnerability
entry.summary:
Author: thegirlwithnofreckles

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,068Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 66

Summary: So on a work night Stiles, saw a guy die, held him while dying, learned his crush had a fated mate somewhere, heard Deaton make a joke, and somehow the most surprising thing was the latest.
